overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's corporate district at dusk. The player moves past towering skyscrapers with digital billboards, crosses a busy intersection, and approaches a massive corporate arch structure while surrounded by neon-lit architecture and moderate traffic.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering building 01
passing parked vehicles on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk while looking up at the towering corporate building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white hat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall black and yellow corporate tower with illuminated 01 signage
curved elevated roadway structure with metal supports
large red illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow street canyon toward the iconic building 01, a massive corporate tower with distinctive yellow and black patterning. The camera tilts up to admire the structure while pedestrians walk ahead and traffic moves along the multi-lane road to the left.

events.description: exits narrow street canyon into open intersection area
white van drives past from left to right while crossing

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crosswalk among a crowd of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
pedestrian or vehicle bridge spanning the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow street into a wide open intersection filled with pedestrians crossing in the same direction. The building 01 complex falls behind as the camera crosses the yellow-lined crosswalk, while a white van passes by on the left and an overhead bridge structure becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with advertising

events.description: enters covered area beneath the elevated highway structure
lighting shifts to predominantly artificial neon as the sky is obscured by overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside the multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking in same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and beams of the elevated highway
tall digital advertising screen showing promotional content
signage spanning across the street showing route information

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete overpass structure that shelters the sidewalk from the overcast sky. The environment shifts to artificial neon lighting as large digital billboards line the right side of the path, displaying advertisements while traffic continues to flow on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with massive connecting arch structure

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the massive corporate arch structure
flying vehicle passes overhead between the towers

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the massive architecture and flying traffic

notable_agents.action: flying aerodyne vehicle passing between the skyscrapers

entered.detail: enormous structural arch connecting two mega-towers with illuminated green signage
dark colored aerodyne flying between buildings
cluster of illuminated skyscrapers with multiple digital screens

segments.scene_description: Entering a wide corporate plaza with an unobstructed view of a massive architectural arch connecting two mega-towers. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the structure as a flying vehicle passes overhead between the buildings, while the surrounding towers display clusters of bright digital billboards against the darkening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense corporate canyon that gradually opens into a sprawling, neon-lit architectural plaza. It begins by moving along a narrow street toward a massive yellow and black corporate tower, with the camera tilting upward to capture the scale of the building above the flowing traffic. As the camera emerges from the street, the view expands into a wide intersection where the tower recedes behind a crowd of pedestrians crossing a yellow-lined street. The scene then shifts beneath a heavy concrete overpass, transitioning from the overcast sky to an environment dominated by artificial neon light and glowing digital billboards. Finally, the path opens into a vast corporate plaza, where the camera tilts up once more to reveal a massive architectural arch connecting two mega-towers as a flying vehicle glides through the darkening sky.
